title: rubus rankei
intro: Rubus rankei, also known as the Rankin raspberry or Rankin black raspberry, is a species of raspberry plant native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus rankei include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection against cell damage. Rubus rankei can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
